title: Post-v6.9 direction: agent session streaming evidence
description: Evaluate GitHub Copilot agent session streaming as an AOF direction input and decide whether streamed prompts, responses, and tool calls should become canonical runtime observability evidence.
triage_notes: Direction review completed. Adopt Agent Session Observability / Runtime Event Stream as the strongest v7.0 candidate; implementation remains bounded to local, vendor-neutral event stream contracts first.
